title: mirabilis suffruticosa
intro:
Mirabilis suffruticosa, also known as the Dwarf Four O'Clock, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Nyctaginaceae family, characterized by its vibrant purple flowers and succulent stems.

This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections.

The health benefits of Mirabilis suffruticosa include its potential to reduce pain and swelling, promote tissue repair, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable plant for traditional medicine.

Mirabilis suffruticosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to wound care, showcasing its versatility in traditional and modern herbalism practices.
